[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 1/29 (Mon), Bounty rewards will be tripled!
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your student's skill!

🗓️Period: 1/29 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 2/5 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
